warnings: This is a seed catalogue: DMC official range metadata is reliable, but individual hex colours are approximations.
Mouliné Spécial official page says 500 options; this seed has 489 entries matching the visible RGB table and common current solid-floss colour chart coverage.
localItemCode is derived from rangeSku and dmcCode and is not claimed as an official retail SKU.
Five seed rows had source hex/RGB disagreement; hex was normalised from the RGB triplets and the raw seed hex was retained on each affected thread under source.rawSeedHex.
